name: lab upload and normalization results flow
summary: Adds a frontend upload flow, backend normalization endpoint, and results page rendering for normalized biomarker output.
user_visible_flows: user sees validation errors for malformed input
system_flows: file upload request hits normalization endpoint
normalization service maps aliases and units
ambiguous and unmapped rows are surfaced to the user
notes: This change spans UI interaction, request handling, data normalization, and user-visible error states.
